description: Document OCR powered by an on-host vision-language model. Single image, self-contained.

firstLogin.note: Internal stateless service — exposes the OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint on vibe_net for server-to-server calls from other Vibe apps (e.g. vibe-tx-converter via GLM_OCR_URL=http://vibe-glm-ocr:8090). userFacing=false keeps the path out of the public Caddy vhost. No user model, no login, no database, no Redis — the upstream image is llama.cpp's llama-server with the GLM-OCR F16 GGUF baked in. Health: /health.
